# progressHandler

**Instance Property**

A block Photos calls periodically while downloading the asset.

## Declaration

```swift
var progressHandler: ((Double, UnsafeMutablePointer<ObjCBool>) -> Void)? { get set }
```

## Discussion

If you request an asset whose data is not on the local device, and have enabled downloading with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHContentEditingInputRequestOptions/isNetworkAccessAllowed] property, Photos calls your block periodically to report progress and allow canceling the download.

The block takes the following parameters:



## Fetching Asset Data from iCloud

- **isNetworkAccessAllowed**: A Boolean value that specifies whether Photos can download the asset from iCloud.
